content.full_text:
DearMr. McAlister:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the
Political Reform Act (the "Act').r
QUESTION
Farn PoLrrrcAL PnecrrcEs Connvrrs sroN
428 J Street. Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95914-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
October 31,2002
Alister McAlister
13055 Orange Road
Wilton, CA95603-9664
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-02-273
How may you use surplus funds contained in your old committee, which were
raised when you served in the Assembly from 197l-1986?
CONCLUSION
The use of surplus campaign funds is governed by Elections Code section 20300.
You should direct further inquiry to the Office of the Attorney General with respect to
that code section.
FACTS
You served in the California State Assembly from 197l-1986. The balance in
your campaign committee account is approximately $6,039.25, allreceived prior to your
departure from the Legislature.
ANALYSIS
In 1999, in connection with amendments to the Act by Proposition 208, we
advised you regarding the use of surplus campaign funds pursuant to then-regulation
I Government Code sections 81000 - gl}l4. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
€


File No. A-02-273
Page No. 2
18519.4. (McAlister Advice Lette4 A-gg-2g3.) That regulation set forth certain rules
regarding use of funds that were raised prior to January I , 1989.
Regulation 18519.4 has since been repealed by the Commission. As we have
advised in the past, section20300 of the Elections Code governs the use of funds raised
prior to January 1,1989 (Fletcher Advice Letter, No. A-97-019; Biggs Advice Letter, No.
92'445). A copy of Elections Code section 20300 is enclosed. Because section 20300 of
the Elections Code is not part of the Act, we refer you to the Office of the Attorney
General for advice regarding compliance with that code section.
We also wish to make you aware of Commission regulation 18404.1. That
regulation requires any candidate controlled committee organized for elective state office
for an election held prior to January 7,2001, to be terminated no later than December 3l
of this year. A copy of that regulation and regulation 18404 (filing of committee
terminations) is also enclosed for your use.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-s660.
Sincerely
Luisa
By:
. Scott
Counsel, Legal Division
Enclosures
CSrjg
I:\Advicelfts\02-273
